calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-26-2008 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Julia M. Adams, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Jackie Hamilton, William Scranton, III and Von Scranton, each of whom were placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Tracy Anderson.
Settlement agreement reached between plaintiffs and defendant Jonnie Gilbert, II on April 29, 2008.
Cross-Complaint dismissed on May 2, 2008.
Default entered against on defendant Tracy Anderson on January 16, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on July 30, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Jackie Hamilton, William Scranton, III and Von Scranton, and against the Defaulted Defendant Tacy Anderson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $267,441.00.
Punitive Damages - $30,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $15,268.98.
Costs - $1,009.50. for a total of $313,719.48.
Each plaintiff shall receive $104,573.16.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
